testsuite.name: com.earl.bank.integration.TransactionTest

testcase.name: For field amount should return Amount should be more than 0.00
For field currency should return Currency should be selected
For field direction should return Direction of the transaction should be selected
For field accountId should return Account id should not be null
For field accountId should return Account Id should be more than 0
